description: mitmproxy is an interactive, SSL/TLS-capable intercepting proxy with a console interface. Allows traffic flow to be intercepted, inspected, modified and replayed.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/mitmproxy && python3 mitmproxy.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/mitmproxy && python3 mitmproxy.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/mitmproxy && python3 mitmproxy.py --help`. Intercepting HTTPS proxy for penetration testers.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the network category. Fits when the engagement needs: Intercepting HTTPS proxy for penetration testers.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Intercepting HTTPS proxy for penetration testers.
